home.desc: Overseas meetup registration, passport OCR, flight tracking, vehicle/hotel assignment, real-time communication. Automate everything for business trips.
home.feat_register_desc: Domestic/overseas, required info, passport upload in one simple step
home.feat_passport_desc: AI automatically analyzes uploaded passport images to extract text data
home.feat_flight_desc: Flight schedule integration, real-time delay notifications for all parties
home.feat_pickup_desc: Vehicle assignment, driver communication, photo upload for quick pickup
home.feat_hotel_desc: Twin room roommate auto-matching, attendee placement confirmation
home.feat_comm_desc: Role-based channels for drivers, managers, and hotel staff
home.feat_country_desc: Auto-guide for travel essentials, immigration info, and visa requirements
home.feat_telegram_desc: Auto-send registration confirmation, delay alerts, 10-min movement reminders
home.feat_data_desc: Filter by period/country/type for participant data and correlation analysis
home.feat_ai_desc: LLM-based chatbot answers questions about travel prep, visa, schedule
home.feat_survey_desc: Create post-meetup surveys, send via Telegram, analyze results
home.feat_baggage_desc: Upload baggage tag photo for AI recognition, real-time status tracking
home.footer: © 2026 Meetup Travel Automation System. All rights reserved.
home.onboardingBanner: Completa la configurazione del profilo per accedere a tutte le funzionalità.

register.title: Meetup Registration
register.overseasInfo: For overseas meetups, twin rooms are provided by default. Please write your preferred roommate's name in the notes.
register.baggageNotice: Excess baggage can be paid at your own expense.
register.name: Name
register.allergiesPh: Please list any allergies (e.g., peanuts, shellfish, dairy)
register.bagNotesPh: Special items (golf bag, ski equipment, instruments, etc.)
register.teamNamePh: Use the same name for team members
register.successDesc: Your meetup application has been submitted. Your itinerary will be sent after review.
register.requiredError: Please fill in all required fields.
register.transportFlightInfo: Domestic flight information will be sent after approval. Please provide your preferred departure time above.
register.transportKtxInfo: KTX/SRT ticket information will be sent after approval. Please provide your preferred departure time above.

chatbot.title: AI Travel Assistant
chatbot.desc: Ask anything about your meetup & business trip
chatbot.error: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
chatbot.selectMeetup: Select a meetup for more accurate answers
chatbot.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI Travel Assistant
chatbot.welcomeDesc: Feel free to ask about travel essentials, visa, schedule, pickup, accommodation, and more.
chatbot.disclaimer: AI-generated answers are for reference only. Please confirm with the administrator for accuracy.
chatbot.q1: What should I prepare for the trip?
chatbot.q2: How do I apply for a visa?
chatbot.q4: How can I check my room assignment?
chatbot.q6: I'd like to check my itinerary

onboarding.basicProfileDesc: Inserisci le informazioni di base necessarie per meetup/viaggi di lavoro. Una volta inserite, non dovrai reinserirle.
onboarding.profileDesc: Enter the basic information needed for meetups/business trips. Once entered, you won't need to re-enter it.

immigration.loginRequired: Effettua il login per visualizzare la tua checklist per l'immigrazione.
immigration.allReady: Tutti i documenti richiesti sono pronti per l'immigrazione.
immigration.notReady: {{count}}/3 documenti pronti. Prepara gli elementi rimanenti.
immigration.name: Nome
immigration.expiryWarning: Il passaporto scade tra 6 mesi. Alcuni paesi richiedono una validità di almeno 6 mesi.
immigration.noPassport: Passaporto non registrato. Registra le informazioni del tuo passaporto.
immigration.noTickets: Nessun biglietto aereo ancora assegnato. I biglietti saranno disponibili una volta assegnati dall'organizzatore.
immigration.noVouchers: Nessun voucher hotel ancora assegnato. I voucher saranno disponibili una volta assegnati dall'organizzatore.
immigration.tip1: Assicurati che il tuo passaporto abbia una validità di almeno 6 mesi dalla data del viaggio.
immigration.tip2: Tieni a portata di mano il biglietto aereo (andata e ritorno) per l'ispezione dell'immigrazione.
immigration.tip3: Il voucher dell'hotel funge da prova di alloggio ai fini dell'immigrazione.
immigration.tip4: Scarica copie PDF di tutti i documenti per l'accesso offline durante il viaggio.
immigration.tip5: Controlla i requisiti per il visto per il tuo paese di destinazione prima della partenza.
